All Bizarre Lineage Stands

The complete database of every Bizarre Lineage Stand available in the game. Click any Stand below to view its full stat breakdown, moveset, passive ability, and recommended fighting style pairing.

There are currently 17 unique Stands in Bizarre Lineage, each with its own rarity, moveset, and combat specialty. Stands in Bizarre Lineage range from Common rarity all the way up to Mythical Evolution, and your Stand choice directly affects your effectiveness in PvP arenas and PvE raids.

Use this Bizarre Lineage stands database alongside our tier list to identify which Stand fits your playstyle. Pair your Stand with the right fighting style and sub-ability for maximum combat performance.
